meta.title: Phoenix Contact - Large Scale Deployment of mGuard
meta.description: Tyler Burke, a Field Application Specialist with Phoenix Contact, briefly describes the company and product, and then dives into a large water client who deployed over 100 mGuard's. He talks about the challenges of managing these devices when they were initially deployed and how the mGuard Device Manager solved these problems when it was recently deployed.
